insights: The market experienced a structural shift around day 16, moving from a ~1000 job baseline to a ~1300 job baseline, indicating a significant influx of new graduate roles.
While general software engineering roles show slight volatility, specialized roles in Data/ML and SRE demonstrate higher stability and consistent demand.
The sustained gap between the 7-day average (1306) and 30-day average (1161) confirms a strong upward trend, suggesting that the recent surge is not a temporary anomaly but a new hiring cycle phase.
